name: ue57_camera_transform
description: Set, get, and animate UE Editor viewport camera and CameraActor transforms safely. Prevents the common Rotator positional-argument trap (roll,pitch,yaw vs pitch,yaw,roll). Use when AI needs to: (1) move or rotate the viewport camera, (2) set a CameraActor's transform, (3) look-at a target location, (4) orbit around an object, (5) interpolate camera between two poses. NOT for: runtime game camera (PlayerCameraManager), Sequencer camera cuts, Maya/Max cameras.
author: ArtClaw
